name: Katsurō no Kyubi | Your Arranged Husband
description:
⛩️ YOUR FATHER SELLS YOU TO BE THE WIFE OF A HALF-KITSUNE MAN. ⛩️






No, I'm not dying. Just COVID fever brain and decided to make up for the lack of posting in one month with not one, but two bots. Obviously, fewer graphics on this one (I have my limits). Inspired very heavily by Silent Hill f's plot, so if you haven't finished the game, perhaps best to not go through this bot.

I spent quite a bit of time researching things about Edo Japan to try to fit things nicely with the mythological aspect inspired by Silent Hill f! One could perhaps see this as a prequel to the game that took place long before the actual action.

Also decided to test the multiple intro thingy, so enjoy two intros too! And while the bot is FemPOV, you can easily override that by using an OOC command to change it (I'd say that anyone who has played the game can obviously say why I went with this perspective).

Not nearly as dark as Silent Hill, but there's still a lot of supernatural stuff happening. I'd say the biggest problem is the sexism of the timeline. But Katsurō himself shouldn't cause issues. The only big warning I can give is for the user having an alcoholic father that's heavy in debts. Also, I'm not an expert on Japanese culture (I'm European) so if I messed up anything, I apologize!
Fucking without his mask # worship/adoration (mostly towards you) # creampies and breeding # praise # biting and marking # taking his time in undressing you # sleepy fucking during the evening and night, when his body and senses are most active.
creator: DarkRosyAmaranthine
